features: GREAT VALUE - Package includes 12 pieces hair combs in 6 colors: purple, red, yellow, pink, blue and green, 2 pcs per color
PREMIUM MATERIAL - Our hair combs are made of high quality plastic, durable unbreakable smooth and anti-static hair dressing combs set. Suitable for thick, curly or straight hair
POCKET SIZE - Approx. 13 x 3.5 cm / 5 x 1.4 inch (L x W), these hair combs are perfect for carrying around in a pocket or pure
WIDE APPLICATION - These hair combs are good for home daily use and hotel usage, also could be applied in barber shops or salon hairdressing and styling
FOR EVERYBODY - Our hair comb set is suitable for all ages and all genders (the young and the old, Adults and Kids, Mens hair comb and hair combs for women, Girls and Boys) and for most types of hair
description: Product description Specifications: Material: plastic Color: purple, red, yellow, pink, blue and green Size (L x W): approx. 13 x 3.5 cm / 5 x 1.4 inch Package includes: 12 x Hair Combs Directions Start from the ends of the hair and work up to avoid breakage. Use gentle strokes for detangling. Suitable for all hair types.
